column5: NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "10101_Recommendation_Text", "I\'ve found a faster route that saves five minutes. Would you like to switch?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "10201_Recommendation_Text", "We\'re approaching your destination. Would you like me to find parking?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "10301_Recommendation_Text", "Traffic is moving more smoothly in the next lane. Would you like to change lanes when it\'s safe?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "10401_Recommendation_Text", "The lane next to you appears to be moving faster. Would you like to switch lanes now?")
NSLOCTEXT("[D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "3FBC7AE24C1A7CA06936608E1ED3FF08", "Ben just sent you a message asking for a ride. Would you like me to add a stop to pick him up?")

NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "20101_Recommendation_Text", "Traffic is getting slower, so this might be a good time to relax. Would you like to listen to some music?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "1DEA3A6C4D2B4983FA75DFA818AA322D", "It\'s a nice day out there. Would you like some music?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "1EA4E52F4B23691FB45A97964475BFD1", "The cabin has been quiet for a while. Would you like to start a playlist?")

NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "CDF64377411EE7930971498D742DC115", "I\'ve found a popular playlist that many are enjoying right now. Would you like to try what others are listening to?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "7F954CD24A4C74014F9429989A7D523F", "There\'s a featured playlist available right now. Would you like me to play it?")

NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "20201_Recommendation_Text", "There\'s a radio news and traffic update available right now. Would you like to listen to the radio?")
NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "20301_Recommendation_Text", "You\'ve been driving for a while. Would you like me to order a coffee for you?")

NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "20401_Recommendation_Text", "You have a package that\'s just been delivered. Would you like me to remind you when you arrive at your destination?")

NSLOCTEXT("RecommendationTable [D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "AC30F7FE4FCD795441249692D4D19EAA", "The weather forecast says it may start raining soon. Would you like me to close the windows at home for you?")
NSLOCTEXT("[D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "1C8A3C7945D15AC5CC649AB4FCB83673", "This is a testing recommendation, please accept it.")
NSLOCTEXT("[D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "94492374476D668BFA2F75AD21CAA3CA", "This is a testing recommendation, please reject it.")
NSLOCTEXT("[D586949EAF918BDA2451F5DB32597A56]", "DA020CBB48DD2920AECF1C98FEA1801E", "This is a testing route recommendation, please accept it and turn right at the next crossing.")
